case_title: 2600 18TH STREET OWNERS ASSOC. VS. NATHANIEL ROBINSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY 2600 18TH STREET OWNERS ASSOC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, NATHANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF 2600 18TH STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SUSANA MACKENZIE, MANAGEMENT AGENT. DEFENDANT NATHANIEL ROBINSON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED MAR-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, NATHANIEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2600 18TH STREET OWNERS ASSOC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY 2600 18TH STREET OWNERS ASSOC. ROBINSON, NATHANIEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 2600 18TH STREET OWNERS ASSOC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, NATHANIEL $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $980.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
